# hulistmi-ai.workers.dev

## HTTP API

- Fetch guide Markdown: `GET /consumer/en/doc/harmonyos-guides/<path>`
- Fetch reference Markdown: `GET /consumer/en/doc/harmonyos-references/<path>`
- Search: `GET /search?q=<query>`
- Catalog: `GET /catalog?catalogName=harmonyos-guides&language=en`

## MCP Integration

- Endpoint: `https://hulistmi-ai.workers.dev/mcp`
- WebMCP manifest: `https://hulistmi-ai.workers.dev/webmcp/manifest.json`
- Tools: `searchHarmonyOSDocumentation`, `fetchHarmonyOSDocumentation`, `fetchHarmonyOSCatalog`

## CLI

- Package: `@hulistmi/hulistmi`
- Binary: `hulistmi`

## AI Agent Skill

- Skill: `https://hulistmi-ai.workers.dev/SKILL.md`
- Well-known skill: `https://hulistmi-ai.workers.dev/.well-known/agent-skills/hulistmi/SKILL.md`

## Notice

hulistmi-ai.workers.dev is unofficial, on-demand, transient, not an archive, not a bulk mirror, not a redistribution channel, and not a bypass mechanism for Huawei access controls.
